scenes.visual_action: Client sends request; proxy intercepts and relabels sender before forwarding to server
scenes.incoming: Every request from this office goes through one desk first.
scenes.outgoing: The server never sees who really asked.

scenes.visual_action: Server hands response to proxy; proxy relabels destination and passes it back to the waiting client
scenes.incoming: The server replies to the desk, not to you directly.
scenes.outgoing: The desk hands the answer back to whoever asked.

scenes.visual_action: Three separate clients each send a request; proxy funnels all three through the same outgoing identity
scenes.incoming: Ten desks in the building, one exit door.
scenes.outgoing: Outside, every request looks like it came from the same place.
scenes.notes: needs a third client sprite added to sequence before marking ready

scenes.visual_action: Proxy checks its cache shelf, finds a matching answer, and hands it to the client without contacting the server
scenes.incoming: Sometimes the desk already has the answer on a shelf.
scenes.outgoing: No trip to the server needed this time.

scenes.notes: placeholder scene left intentionally incomplete to exercise the validator
